subcodes.first_line: Your letter was received, and supplications and entreaties were offered to the Abhá Kingdom that that blessed gathering in Germany [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید و بملکوت ابهی تضرع و ابتهال گردید که آنجمعیت مبارکه در آلمان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @growth of the Cause, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
